overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through the Arasaka Memorial park with stone pillars and uplighting, transitioning to an overlook of Night City's foggy skyline with neon billboards, then descending to a highway and bus stop. The scene features wet reflective surfaces, futuristic architecture, and light vehicle traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: memorial garden with stone pillars and uplighting

events.description: emerges from enclosed stone corridor into semi-open memorial area with view of palm trees

agents.ego_description: walking through the memorial garden corridor, navigating between illuminated stone walls

entered.detail: tall concrete block wall with horizontal lines and ground uplighting
circular ground lights illuminating the stone walls from below
dark wet tiles reflecting the artificial lighting
tree with yellow foliage visible beyond the stone structures

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a narrow corridor between tall stone memorial walls with dramatic ground uplighting. The camera walks forward through the memorial garden, the wet pavement reflecting the warm lights. As the path opens slightly, palm trees and the distant city become visible through the fog.

scene_state.functional_zone: memorial overlook with city skyline view

events.description: exits the memorial corridor onto an open overlook with panoramic view of Night City skyline
ambient light shifts from warm artificial uplighting to cooler neon glow from distant billboards

agents.ego_description: walking along the memorial edge while viewing the foggy city skyline and neon-lit skyscrapers

entered.detail: futuristic skyscrapers with illuminated windows visible through fog
tall palm trees silhouetted against the night sky
tall building covered in glowing neon advertisements and holographic displays
elevated highway structure crossing the middle distance

segments.scene_description: The scene opens to a wide overlook revealing Night City's foggy skyline with towering neon-lit skyscrapers in the distance. Palm trees line the edge of the memorial grounds. The camera pans to take in the view before continuing along the path, transitioning from the warm memorial lighting to the cooler ambient glow of the city's neon signs.

events.description: passes a person sitting on the concrete stairs to the right

agents.ego_description: walking along the elevated memorial path, passing concrete stairs and illuminated stone pillars

notable_agents.action: person sitting on concrete stairs, facing away from camera

entered.detail: wide concrete steps leading up the memorial structure
grassy slope descending away from the walkway

segments.scene_description: The camera turns back along the memorial walkway, with stone pillars and uplighting on either side. A person sits on the concrete stairs to the right. The path continues past grassy terrain with the city skyline now visible only in the background, transitioning back to the sheltered memorial environment.

events.description: descends from the elevated memorial to street level, approaching the highway
vehicles pass by on the highway as the camera approaches the road edge

agents.ego_description: walking down the grassy embankment toward the highway, observing passing traffic

notable_agents.action: futuristic car driving along the highway with headlights on

entered.detail: multi-lane road with moving traffic and street lighting
dark-colored futuristic sedan with illuminated headlights
tall pole with bright overhead lamp illuminating the road

segments.scene_description: The camera descends from the memorial elevation down a grassy slope toward the highway. The environment opens up to reveal the road with sparse traffic - futuristic vehicles passing by with headlights cutting through the fog. Street lights line the road, and neon signs become visible in the distance as the camera approaches street level.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered bus stop along neon-lit highway

events.description: reaches the covered bus stop shelter with benches and overhead lighting

agents.ego_description: walking into the bus stop shelter along the highway, passing empty benches

entered.detail: covered structure with overhead neon lighting and metal benches
green neon sign reading 'softsys' on building facade
dark wet road surface reflecting street lights and neon signs

segments.scene_description: The final segment reaches a covered bus stop shelter along the highway, featuring metal benches and overhead lighting. The 'softsys' neon sign glows green in the background among other colorful billboards. The wet asphalt reflects the myriad of neon lights from the surrounding Night City buildings as the camera moves under the shelter.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from the intimate, warm glow of a memorial garden to the expansive, neon-drenched atmosphere of a futuristic city highway. It begins in a narrow corridor between tall stone walls with dramatic uplighting, moving across wet pavement that reflects the warm light as the path opens toward a foggy skyline. As the camera reaches a wide overlook, the scene shifts from the memorial's gold tones to the cool ambient glow of towering neon skyscrapers before turning back along the walkway past stone pillars and a seated figure. The camera then descends a grassy slope, leaving the sheltered garden behind to reveal a highway where futuristic vehicles cut through the fog with their headlights. Finally, the movement concludes at a covered bus stop shelter, where the wet asphalt reflects a myriad of colorful billboards and a glowing green softsys sign.
